content.full_text:
July 21, 1976

Mr. Richard Bryant  
Los Angeles County Registrar-Recorder's Office  
Campaign Reporting Division  
808 North Spring Street  
Los Angeles, California 90012

Dear Mr. Bryant:

This letter is to confirm my advice to you by telephone on July 20, 1976.

Copies of campaign statements filed with Los Angeles County do not have to bear a photocopy of the signature appearing on the original campaign report. Therefore, copies conformed by typing, printing, writing or stamping the name of the signatory on the verification portion of the copy are in compliance with the requirements of Government Code Section 81005.

Sincerely,

Nan Hambleton  
Special Compliance Representative

NH:bw

bcc: Mr. Bill Mars  
Legal Department  
California Farm Bureau  
2855 Telegraph Avenue  
Berkeley, California 94705
